Body.Content:
Calls to an Auto Attendant that are routed to voicemail will now appear directly within Queues app. This enables organizations to manage shared Auto Attendant voicemails in a centralized experience, making it easier for teams to track, triage, and respond to customer messages.

GA date: August CY2026
